headline: Cadence Design Systems (NASDAQ:CDNS): A Strong Growth Stock with a Solid Technical Setup
summary: Combining fundamental and technical analysis, Cadence Design Systems (CDNS) scores 7/10 for strong profitability and growth, plus a 9/10 technical setup for a favorable entry point in an uptrend.

headline: Stifel Raises Price Target for Cadence Design (CDNS) Following Intel Foundry Partnership
summary: Cadence Design Systems Inc. (NASDAQ:CDNS) ranks among the best 5G stocks to buy right now. On June 9, Stifel maintained its Buy rating on Cadence Design Systems Inc. (NASDAQ:CDNS) and increased its price target from $395 to $432, citing Cadence’s announcement of a multi-year Design Technology Co-Optimization partnership with Intel Foundry aimed at Intel 14A. […]

headline: Cramer Says Credo Technology Is 'Just So Good' — But Warns This Healthcare Name Is A 'Value Trap'
summary: Jim Cramer recommends buying Constellation Energy (CEG) as it has come down too far. ManpowerGroup (MAN) is not a great win. Credo Technology (CRDO) is good. Cramer doesn't want Perrigo (PRGO). Cadence Design (CDNS) is a hold but buy if it comes down.

headline: 5 Stocks In The Spotlight From Wall Street's Most Accurate Analysts Last Week
summary: Dow Jones surges over 350 points, S&P 500 and Nasdaq also rise during Friday's session. Benzinga's Analyst Ratings API can help traders make informed decisions with data from top analysts.
